violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean shelving, fronts and handles of coolers and sides of cooking equipment/grills.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean floors in kitchen more thoroughly.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean shelving, plumbing pipes, fronts and sides of cooking equipment in line area.
